summary: Subcutaneous injection is the preferred method for administering LWMHs as part of postoperative thromboprophylaxis because it offers a safe and effective means without supporting an intravenous alternative significantly better than this established practice. \boxed{\text{Subcutaneous}}
formatted_summary: agent2 (Round 1 summarized): Subcutaneous injection is the preferred method for administering LWMHs as part of postoperative thromboprophylaxis because it offers a safe and effective means without supporting an intravenous alternative significantly better than this established practice. \boxed{\text{Subcutaneous}}. Answer choice: A
